# Pages of Purpose LLC
> Recover. Resolve. Restore. We specialize in asset recovery, unclaimed funds recovery, estate settlements, property title resolution, and cash home buying — transparent, ethical, and results-driven.

## About
Pages of Purpose LLC, founded by Dustin Ray, is a multi-service company operating nationwide. We combine research, legal coordination, and hands-on case management to help individuals recover lost assets, settle estates, resolve property title issues, and sell properties for cash. Our recovery services have no upfront cost — we only get paid when you get paid. Funds are typically ready within 120 days.

## Contact
- Phone: (227) 235-9530
- Email: pagesofpurposellc@gmail.com
- Email: info@pagesofpurpose.com
- Website: https://pagesofpurposellc.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST

## Core Services (Main Site)
- [Homepage](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/): Overview of all services — asset recovery, estate settlements, cash for keys, property buying
- Asset & Unclaimed Funds Recovery: We search county records and government agencies across the US to locate unclaimed funds owed to individuals
- Estate Settlements & Claims Processing: Through genealogy and heirship laws, we locate heirs and process estate claims through probate at no upfront cost
- Cash For Keys: We negotiate cash-for-keys arrangements between new property owners and current occupants
- Property Title Resolution: We resolve complex title issues including liens, judgments, and ownership disputes

## Sell Your Property (Cash Home Buying)
- [Sell Your House Fast](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/): Get a cash offer in 24 hours — no agents, no fees, no repairs
- [Tired of Being a Landlord?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/landlords.html): Solutions for burned-out landlords ready to sell rental properties
- [Inherited a Property?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/probate.html): Sell inherited or probate properties without hassle
- [FSBO Not Working?](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/fsbo.html): Alternative for sellers struggling with For Sale By Owner
- [Distressed Properties](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/distressed.html): Sell fire-damaged, water-damaged, or code-violation properties
- [Title Issues](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/title-issues.html): Sell properties with liens, judgments, or title problems
- [Retail-Ready Homes](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/pages/retail.html): Skip the agent — sell market-ready homes direct for cash

## Guides & Resources
- [How to Stop Foreclosure](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/stop-foreclosure.html): 7 options to stop or avoid foreclosure
- [How to Sell an Inherited House](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/sell-inherited-house.html): Step-by-step guide including probate and tax implications
- [How to Sell a House With a Lien](https://pagesofpurposellc.com/sell/blog/sell-house-with-lien.html): Options for selling when liens exist on your property

## Key Facts
- Founded by Dustin Ray — 10+ years of experience in asset recovery and title research
- Nationwide service coverage across the United States
- No upfront costs for recovery services
- Cash offers on properties within 24 hours
- No real estate agent commissions (save 5-6%)
- Close on properties as fast as 7 days
- We cover all closing costs on property purchases
- Fully licensed and compliant with state and federal regulations
- Typical fund recovery timeline: 120 days
